message:
bd-1e2if.1: add methodology baselines benchmark suite

46 criterion benchmarks across 5 operation groups:
- Task spawn: inject_ready, local_queue_push, batch spawn
- Task cancellation: cancel_region, cancel_reason ops
- Channel send/recv: MPSC try_send/recv, throughput, create
- Cx capability: has_timer/io/registry/remote, budget access
- Budget check: is_exhausted, is_past_deadline, consume, combine

Initial artifacts/baseline.json with CI 95% bounds captured.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -221,6 +221,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "spork_baseline"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "methodology_baselines"
+harness = false
+
 [lints.rust]
 # Default to deny for unsafe code - specific modules that require it can use #[allow(unsafe_code)]
 # The epoll reactor requires unsafe for the polling crate's FFI operations
